name: Asus XG27ACS (WHITE) (IPS Panel, Res: 2560X1440, 180Hz, 1ms GTG ) 2K
highlights: ROG Strix XG27ACS is a high-performance 27-inch QHD gaming monitor featuring a Fast IPS panel with ultra-smooth 180Hz refresh rate, 1ms response time, and vivid 97% DCI-P3 color gamut
Designed for competitive and immersive gameplay, it supports HDR10, Adaptive-Sync, ELMB Sync, and includes versatile connectivity options like DisplayPort 1
With ergonomic adjustments, anti-glare coating, and TÜV-certified eye care, the XG27ACS delivers stunning visuals and superior comfort for both gamers and creators
